mapper.select: SELECT org_id, parent_id, org_name, LEVEL, SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(org_name, '/') AS path FROM org_tree START WITH org_id = #{rootId} CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR org_id = parent_id ORDER SIBLINGS BY org_name
mapper.update: MERGE INTO org_members t USING (SELECT #{orgId} AS org_id, #{userId} AS user_id, #{role} AS role FROM DUAL) s ON (t.org_id = s.org_id AND t.user_id = s.user_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.role = s.role, t.updated_at = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (org_id, user_id, role, created_at) VALUES (s.org_id, s.user_id, s.role, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT org_id, LISTAGG(user_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY user_name) AS member_names FROM org_members om JOIN users u ON om.user_id = u.id WHERE om.org_id = #{orgId} GROUP BY org_id
SELECT /*+ INDEX(o IDX_ORG_STATUS) */ o.org_id, o.org_name, o.status FROM org_tree o WHERE o.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT org_id, org_name, NVL2(parent_id, 'Sub-org', 'Root') AS org_type, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_str, ADD_MONTHS(created_at, 12) AS renewal_date, MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, created_at) AS age_months FROM org_tree WHERE created_at >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
